title: Inactive Customers Without Orders in Last Year
description: You are given customers and orders data. Identify customers who are currently marked as 'inactive' and have not placed any orders in the last 365 days from '2025-01-01'. Ensure that even customers with no orders at all are included.
solution: SELECT c.id, c.name FROM customers c LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id AND o.order_date >= '2024-01-01' WHERE c.status='inactive' AND o.id IS NULL;
